form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 13 at Pornichet December 26 over 1700m, 4 len behind Leha carrying 58.5kg at $9.20. On debut second of 9 at La Teste De Buch June 26 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Othon carrying 58.5kg at $7.70. Likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 13 at Pornichet December 26 over 1700m, 4 len behind Leha carrying 58.5kg at $9.20. On debut second of 9 at La Teste De Buch June 26 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Othon carrying 58.5kg at $7.70. Likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1300m, 2.75 len behind Equuleus with 58kg at $7.90. Second run from a spell raced on the pace before fading 11th of 14 at Fontainebleau on March 6 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Gouttes De Dieu with 59kg at $7.40. May improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1300m, 2.75 len behind Equuleus with 58kg at $7.90. Second run from a spell raced on the pace before fading 11th of 14 at Fontainebleau on March 6 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Gouttes De Dieu with 59kg at $7.40. May improve.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 8th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on December 18 over 1300m, 8 len behind Bourgoin carrying 56kg at $13. Went for a spell before returning ran last of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1300m, 7 len behind Homere with 58kg at $13. Rates highly and should do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Third race start. First start 8th of 10 at Deauville All Weather on December 18 over 1300m, 8 len behind Bourgoin carrying 56kg at $13. Went for a spell before returning ran last of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1300m, 7 len behind Homere with 58kg at $13. Rates highly and should do much better.

form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 14 len behind How Are You carrying 54.5kg at $55. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, second last of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 14 len behind How Are You carrying 54.5kg at $55. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 8th of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1200m, slow going 9 len behind How Are You carrying 55kg at $65. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Lyon-Parilly on May 17 over 1200m, 3 len behind Caro Buono carrying 54kg at $6.80. Can't see her turning things around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second run back. First-up after four months 8th of 12 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1200m, slow going 9 len behind How Are You carrying 55kg at $65. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Lyon-Parilly on May 17 over 1200m, 3 len behind Caro Buono carrying 54kg at $6.80. Can't see her turning things around.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Saint Saens with 55.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at Pornichet on December 14 over 1700m, neck behind Team Breizh with 58kg at $2.80. Fitter and is expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 16 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Saint Saens with 55.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at Pornichet on December 14 over 1700m, neck behind Team Breizh with 58kg at $2.80. Fitter and is expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start second last of 9 at Saint-Cloud on November 9 over 1500m, on a wet track; 25 len behind Argentella with 58kg at $5.90. Returned from break 7th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Vadirouma carrying 58kg at $45. Rates highly and should improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Third race start. First start second last of 9 at Saint-Cloud on November 9 over 1500m, on a wet track; 25 len behind Argentella with 58kg at $5.90. Returned from break 7th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Vadirouma carrying 58kg at $45. Rates highly and should improve sharply.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd in a small field at Limoges on March 15 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Roma Antica with 53kg. Finds a tough assignment this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). At debut, 2nd in a small field at Limoges on March 15 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Roma Antica with 53kg. Finds a tough assignment this time.

form.formComment: First-starter by Night Of Thunder out of Pure Diamond. Looks ready to make a bright start.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Night Of Thunder out of Pure Diamond. Looks ready to make a bright start.
